screenContracts.painSolved: Manufacturers and verified source suppliers need one hybrid operating app for customer orders, buyer-visible finished stock, catalogue-led wholesale purchasing and separate accounting access without losing personal MoolSocial access.
featureOutcomes: Receive and fulfil retailer hotel restaurant and distributor orders
Build buyer-visible stock from master catalogue CSV scan or reviewed new product
Derive confirmable input categories from saleable products
Place wholesale purchase orders with price MOQ pack delivery and payment terms
Open separate manufacturer Business Book for financial and statutory records
Preserve business services chat and personal access
screenContracts.productionNote: Own production route /supply. Reuse Mool, Orders, Stock, Wholesale Buy and Chat. Stock is saleable availability, not accounting. Input matches require verified classification plus manufacturer-confirmed product-to-input mapping.

screenContracts.painSolved: Manufacturers need one accounting home for sales purchases receivables payables GST cash bank reconciliation and protected money without duplicate entry or confusing buyer-visible Stock with accounting.
featureOutcomes: Post captured sales purchases invoices and payments automatically
Show receivables payables and protected money
Provide GST working records cash bank expenses and reconciliation
Keep estimates clearly separate from final accounts
Open detailed books as progressive states inside one route
screenContracts.productionNote: Own production route /supply/books and keep all progressive states inside it.

screenContracts.prototypeName: Manufacturer Product Catalogue and Saleable Stock
screenContracts.painSolved: Manufacturers need a scalable way to publish buyer-visible finished products and quantities from a canonical master catalogue CSV scan or reviewed new product while keeping price MOQ delivery payment terms and raw-material recommendations accurate.
featureOutcomes: Search a server-side canonical catalogue without preloading it
Add or update buyer-visible products and saleable quantity
Import catalogue and stock through mobile or web CSV with validation
Control price MOQ delivery and payment terms
Propose product-linked input categories requiring manufacturer confirmation
Keep product detail and import flows inside one production route
screenContracts.productionNote: Own production route /supply/catalogue and keep all progressive states inside it.

screenContracts.painSolved: Manufacturers need a decision-ready sales order showing buyer line quantities available stock price tax protected money dispatch and delivery terms before confirming full partial or unable-to-fulfil outcomes.
featureOutcomes: Review verified buyer and exact commercial order lines
Confirm full partial or unable-to-fulfil without silent quantity changes
Return remaining demand visibly to allocation
Progress through production packing dispatch delivery invoice and receivable states
Preserve protected money and commercial audit history inside one route
screenContracts.productionNote: Own production route /supply/orders and keep all progressive states inside it.

screenContracts.painSolved: Verified manufacturers need input recommendations tied only to confirmed manufacturing outputs plus supplier price MOQ pack delivery payment protected advance purchase order goods receipt and supplier payment states.
featureOutcomes: Restrict input matching to verified manufacturing activity
Compare input offers with price MOQ delivery and payment terms
Create supplier-grouped purchase orders with protected advance
Track inward delivery goods receipt GST invoice and supplier payment
Prevent raw-material inference for trader or wholesaler resale catalogues
screenContracts.productionNote: Own production route /supply/purchases and keep all progressive states inside it.

screenContracts.painSolved: Manufacturers need one logistics control route for packed orders transport choice GST invoice LR e-way bill dispatch live tracking delivery proof buyer goods receipt and payment-release eligibility.
featureOutcomes: Manage ready in-transit and delivered shipments
Choose own fleet or MoolSocial Transport
Gate dispatch on required documents
Track live shipments and ETA
Match buyer goods receipt and delivery proof
Trigger payment eligibility only through authoritative receipt state
screenContracts.productionNote: Own production route /supply/dispatch and keep all progressive states inside it.

screenContracts.painSolved: Manufacturers need one direct growth route for verified buyer relationships aggregated demand pools funded outcome-based campaigns and sales analytics without becoming a supplier listing marketplace.
featureOutcomes: Manage verified buyer relationships and repeat demand
Act on aggregated demand with quantity geography price and close time
Create funded campaigns with measurable outcomes
Use verified Earn participants for approved field execution
Track conversion retention geography and demand forecast
screenContracts.productionNote: Own production route /supply/growth and keep all progressive states inside it.

screenContracts.prototypeName: Manufacturer Claims Team and Workspace Control
screenContracts.painSolved: Manufacturers need one controlled route for buyer and supplier claims staff permissions verified operating settings security audit and case-linked support while preserving the manufacturer-only operating model.
featureOutcomes: Resolve buyer supplier and transport claims with evidence
Assign least-privilege team roles
Keep manufacturer operating model separately verified
Control devices approvals notifications fleet and factory settings
Access order money GST security and workspace support
screenContracts.productionNote: Own production route /supply/control and keep all progressive states inside it.

screenContracts.painSolved: Manufacturers need permanently visible paid operating products for exclusive sales territories logistics advertising tax accounts audit coordination and exclusive input sourcing with disclosed scope pricing outcomes and professional boundaries.
featureOutcomes: Review manufacturer-specific paid services at all times
Choose area district zone state or national sales scope
Activate pickup delivery and campaign services
Access qualified tax accounts and audit coordination
Request exclusive confirmed-input sourcing contracts
Manage plan review activation active status and requests inside one route

screenContracts.painSolved: Verified captains need a deliberate go-online state, live zone demand, priority trip, earnings and compliance actions without losing personal Mool access.
featureOutcomes: Go online deliberately with location freshness
See live demand and priority work
Open requests trips earnings compliance and chat in one tap

screenContracts.painSolved: Captains need exact pickup destination distance duration payment method gross fare charges and expected net before accepting a committed ride.

screenContracts.painSolved: An assigned captain needs focused pickup navigation, masked rider contact, geofence arrival and OTP-backed trip start.

Contact rider without exposing phone numbers

screenContracts.painSolved: Providers need compact actionable orders bookings appointments or jobs showing price time place payment trust and terms before one-tap acceptance.

Accept and reserve capacity idempotently
Decline or propose another time without abandoning the customer
screenContracts.productionNote: Own production route /provider/requests and keep all progressive states inside it.

screenContracts.painSolved: Accepted provider work needs a profile-specific progressive state machine for execution customer communication proportionate proof completion receipt and settlement.
featureOutcomes: Execute the next required fulfilment action
Communicate within the governed request thread
Complete profile-specific outcome and proof safely
screenContracts.productionNote: Own production route /provider/fulfilment/:requestId and keep all progressive states inside it.
